scope_note: QA Weil Bound from Cassini cert [395]. Primary sources: Weil (1949) doi.org/10.1090/S0002-9904-1949-09219-4 (original Weil bound for varieties over finite fields, |N_q - q^n| in terms of q); Deligne (1974) doi.org/10.1007/BF02684373 (proof of Weil conjectures for abelian varieties, eigenvalue absolute value = q^{w/2} for weight-w forms); Diamond & Shurman (2005) ISBN 978-0-387-27226-9 Ch.9 (Hecke eigenvalue bounds for GL_2 modular forms, |a_p| <= 2*sqrt(p)); LMFDB (2024) https://www.lmfdb.org/ModularForm/GL2/TotallyReal/2.2.5.1 (HMF eigenvalue data, inherited from cert [390]). CLAIM (narrow, falsifiable): For all 34 prime ideals of Z[phi] with N(p) <= 151, the Hecke eigenvalues a_f(p) of form 2.2.5.1-31.1-a satisfy |a_f(p)|^2 < 4*N(p). Equivalent to: the GL_2 Frobenius characteristic polynomial discriminant Delta_GL2 = a_f^2 - 4*N(p) is strictly negative. Structural origin (Cassini to Weil sign flip): the Fibonacci Frobenius has characteristic polynomial x^2 - L_p*x - 1 with det(M^p) = (-1)^p = -1 (Cassini, cert [391]) and discriminant Delta_Fib = L_p^2 + 4 > 0 (real eigenvalues, weight-0). The GL_2 Frobenius has det = N(p) = p (weight-2) and discriminant Delta_GL2 < 0 (complex eigenvalues, |each| = sqrt(N(p))). The weight shift det=-1 to det=p flips the discriminant sign and is the structural source of the Weil bound. Checks: (C1) |a_f(p)|^2 <= 4*N(p) for all 34 prime ideals with N(p) <= 151; (C2) strict inequality (non-CM form); (C3) Fibonacci discriminant Delta_Fib = L_p^2 + 4 > 0 for 10 tested primes; (C4) GL_2 discriminant Delta_GL2 < 0 for all 34 prime ideals; (C5) det(M^p) = (-1)^p = -1 for spot-check primes (Cassini reconfirmation). Theorem NT: all arithmetic is exact integer; det computed via integer matrix exponentiation; observer projections (isqrt for primality) appear only at labeling/output. Extends cert [391] (Cassini identity and sigma=phi-multiplication); cert [394] (GL_1 Frobenius character); cert [390] (LMFDB HMF eigenvalue data source). The discriminant sign flip is the structural link between the Cassini chain [391-394] and the GL_2 Weil bound. Derived 2026-06-12.
